meaning: adj.胜利的,成功的,狂欢的,洋洋得意的
examples: When he returned to the canopy tree his cheeks were flushed and he looked triumphant.
There was a triumphant glitter in his eyes.
It wasn't exactly the triumphant return the Penguins expected after doctors cleared Crosby to play.
They appeared headed for a quick, triumphant march to the top of the podium.
